# CCIRs (Critical Information Requirements)

## Active

- [active] Any bill goes 5 days past due
  - agent: H8
  - review: 2026-07-15

- [active] Calendar conflict appears in the next 48 hours
  - agent: H3

## Archived

- [archived] Email arrives from a now-closed vendor
  - agent: H2
  - archived: vendor relationship ended 2026-06-01
